text_block_list.text: I'm walking by the river on my day off, when...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... wheeze... I'm beat!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
How about we take a break? We've both got
races coming up, so we can't be overworking
ourselves.
choice_data_list: You two sure are working hard.
You two sure are working hard.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, I wasn't exactly planning to get so carried
away, but then...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I think that'll do it for today. I know I'm up
against some real speedsters in my next race, but
I don't want to overdo it...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Hm? That voice...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I knew it was you, Nature. Are you returning to
the dorm?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, yeah. Can you believe it? All this sweat
from a light jog... That's what I get for trying to
do solo training for once.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...I see. Well, I regret to say that I cannot let you
return to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? How come?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: You see, we are in the middle of a... situation.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Ikunoooo! I'm STARVING! I can't wait any longer!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hang on. Nature?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: It looks like the wait was well worth it, Turbo.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hm?! The wait was whale worth it?! When it comes to seafood, I'm a fan of scallops myself!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Ah yes, I see you had a whale of a time waiting patiently to have a run with Nature.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yep, that's right! I was waiting like a beached
whale! And now it's time to race, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, no, I was about to head back to the—gahhh!
Don't give me those goo-goo eyes!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Aaand that's how I ended up in this here situation.
To be fair, this has been some good extra training
for me so far.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yup! It's been great for me too! In fact... I'm all
done! Let's go home!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...What?! We're going back already?! Do you
always turbo boost through your training like
that?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, geez... Now there's someone else in front of
the dorm. What's the deal this time?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Hold up! You're the kids from where I volunteer!
Now what's going on here?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Kids
text_block_list.text:
Three, two, one! Welcome to the "Go Nature"
party!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Um, so... We heard that you're gonna run against
real fast racers in your next race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The kids all wanted to show you their support, so
they set up this party for you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
For me? Hold on... Is this why you stopped me
from going to the dorms before?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Heh, indeed it was. The two of us offered to
distract you and buy them more time. After all,
we also wish to support you.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Nature, we know how hard you've been working
every day in the lead-up to your race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yep! You might've laughed and said you didn't
stand a chance when you saw the racer list, but
you can't trick us!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hang on, I'm kinda having trouble processing all
this... So you guys knew I was practicing on my
own? Oh, geez...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Siiiiigh... I don't know if you should call them "great" or just plain "nosy."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But still, I can't believe you did all this for me.
Seeing all this...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Even I can't help thinking I've gotta win! And
that's totally not like me! Gahhhh!

Despite her disgruntled complaints, Nice Nature
smiles and joins the party. It looks like the extra
support has motivated her even more.
